action.reasoning: Observation: The last 6.08125% LSTM blend scored below the current best 6.075% blend, and 6.0625% was also slightly below, indicating the narrow optimum has already been found. Analysis: With only one iteration remaining and time limited, further probing risks ending without explicitly final-submitting the best checkpoint. Decision: submit the known best checkpoint checkpoints/mix_gru93925_lstmval6075.pt using the validated predict.py.
